case_title: JASON TERRANCE FEATHERINGHAM VS. JOSHUA ADAM MALINOSKY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY FEATHERINGHAM, JASON TERRANCE AS TO DEFENDANT MALINOSKY, JOSHUA ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
